title: PB-147 VERIFIED: Runtime Branch Consolidation Matrix
review_scope: Branches classified NEEDS_RUNTIME_EXTRACTION in PB-146 only.

classification_definitions.SAFE_DELETE: No runtime extraction needed and branch appears merged/no-diff; delete only after human confirmation.
classification_definitions.ALREADY_IN_MAIN: Runtime-relevant branch appears already represented in main; verify before deletion.
classification_definitions.REVIEW_REQUIRED: Insufficient or documentation/evidence-heavy branch; needs human review before action.
classification_definitions.EXTRACT_RUNTIME: Runtime code appears in branch delta; extract minimal runtime patch before PR.
classification_definitions.BLOCKED: Known mixed-scope or validation-blocked branch; do not merge/delete until blockers close.

branches.recommended_action: Known mixed or incomplete validation branch; keep fail-closed until blockers are resolved.
